scripts.format: biome format --write astro.config.mjs playwright.config.ts src/components src/styles scripts package.json tsconfig.json && markdownlint-cli2 --fix "README.md" "src/content/**/*.{md,mdx}"
scripts.lint:biome: biome lint astro.config.mjs playwright.config.ts src/components src/styles scripts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:biome && pnpm run lint:markdown && pnpm run lint:external-links && pnpm run lint:no-cdn
scripts.test:a11y: node ./scripts/run-with-preview.mjs "pnpm exec playwright test e2e/accessibility.spec.ts e2e/smoke.spec.ts"
scripts.test:visual: node ./scripts/run-with-preview.mjs "pnpm exec playwright test e2e/theme.spec.ts e2e/visual.spec.ts"
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run test:links && pnpm run test:a11y && pnpm run test:lighthouse
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:links && pnpm run test:a11y
